---
title: "Talks & Policy"
---

## Policy engagement

[May 2025]{.when} [Invited roundtable speaker · Lauterpacht Centre for International Law, Cambridge]{.what} [Roundtable on legal frameworks for climate and biodiversity policy]{.meta}

[May 2025]{.when} [Expert contributor · Co-design the Future(s) of Payments for Ecosystem Services in the EU]{.what} [Stakeholder workshop on EU PES scheme design]{.meta}

[April 2025]{.when} [Invited panellist · ThinkForest: Ask a Scientist — Carbon Farming in the European Forest Sector]{.what} [Science–policy panel on carbon farming implementation]{.meta}

[Oct. 2024]{.when} [Invited expert · ThinkForest: What Do We Know About Carbon Farming, Brussels]{.what} [Presented Chiti et al. (2024) to EU Commission officials at the Permanent Representation of Austria to the EU; roundtable on the EU Carbon Removals Certification Framework]{.meta}

## Conference presentations

[Sept. 2026]{.when} [XXVII Annual BIOECON Conference]{.what} [St John's College, University of Cambridge — oral presentation]{.meta}

[June–July 2026]{.when} [7th World Congress of Environmental and Resource Economists (WCERE)]{.what} [Nova School of Business and Economics, Cascais — oral presentation]{.meta}

[March 2026]{.when} [3rd European Carbon Farming Summit]{.what} [Padua — oral presentation]{.meta}

[June 2025]{.when} [International Symposium on Climate, Finance and Sustainability (ISCFS)]{.what} [Paris — oral presentation]{.meta}

[Oct. 2024]{.when} [LabEx ARBRE Day]{.what} [INRAE Champenoux, Nancy — oral presentation]{.meta}

[Sept. 2024]{.when} [XXV Annual BIOECON Conference]{.what} [King's College, University of Cambridge — oral presentation]{.meta}

[July 2024]{.when} [26th IUFRO World Congress]{.what} [Stockholm — poster]{.meta}

[June 2024]{.when} [8th Workshop on Non-Market Valuation (WONV)]{.what} [University of Leeds — oral presentation]{.meta}

[June 2024]{.when} [2nd Action versus Inaction Facing Climate Change (AICC) Conference]{.what} [Strasbourg — poster]{.meta}

[June 2023]{.when} [28th EAERE Annual Conference]{.what} [European Association of Environmental and Resource Economists, Limassol — oral presentation]{.meta}

## Seminars

[June 2025]{.when} [C-EENRG Research Seminar]{.what} [Centre for Environment, Energy and Natural Resource Governance, University of Cambridge]{.meta}

## Teaching

[Nov. 2024]{.when} [Regulation of Ecosystem Services — Market-Based Instruments and PES]{.what} [AgroParisTech, MSc Forests and their Environment (FEN), Nancy]{.meta}

[Nov. 2024]{.when} [Introduction to Stated Preference Methods for Ecosystem Services Valuation]{.what} [AgroParisTech, MSc Forests and their Environment (FEN), Nancy]{.meta}
